component.name: Screenix
component.summary: Professional screen recorder with smooth zoom effects

description.p: Screenix is a professional screen recorder for Linux with real-time GPU-accelerated zoom effects, click indicators, and hardware-accelerated export. Works on both X11 and Wayland (via XDG desktop portal and PipeWire).

ul.li: Real-time zoom with smooth cursor-following animation
Wayland support via XDG ScreenCast portal and PipeWire
GNOME, KDE Plasma, and wlroots compositor support
